ddls:
CREATE TABLE "virtual_machines" (
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual machine */,
  "vm_name" TEXT /* Name of the virtual machine */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the virtual machine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the virtual machine was deployed */,
  "cloud_provider" TEXT /* Cloud service provider (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the VM is deployed */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of VM (e.g., t2.micro, n1-standard-2) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the VM's status was updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Metadata tags for the VM (e.g., environment, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpu_metrics" (
  "cpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPU metric record */,
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the virtual machine */,
  "cpu_max" REAL /* Maximum CPU usage percentage */,
  "cpu_avg" REAL /* Average CPU usage percentage */,
  "cpu_95th" REAL /* 95th percentile CPU usage percentage */,
  "cpu_99th" REAL /* 99th percentile CPU usage percentage */,
  "total_cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Total CPU cores of the VM */,
  "load_avg_1min" REAL /* Load average over the last 1 minute */,
  "load_avg_5min" REAL /* Load average over the last 5 minutes */,
  "load_avg_15min" REAL /* Load average over the last 15 minutes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cpu_metrics_vm_id FOREIGN KEY ("vm_id") REFERENCES virtual_machines ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_metrics" (
  "memory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory metric record */,
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the virtual machine */,
  "memory_max_gb" REAL /* Maximum memory usage in GB */,
  "memory_avg_gb" REAL /* Average memory usage in GB */,
  "memory_95th_gb" REAL /* 95th percentile memory usage in GB */,
  "memory_99th_gb" REAL /* 99th percentile memory usage in GB */,
  "total_memory_gb" REAL /* Total memory in GB of the VM */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_metrics_vm_id FOREIGN KEY ("vm_id") REFERENCES virtual_machines ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_metrics" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic metric record */,
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the virtual machine */,
  "traffic_in_b" TEXT /* Incoming traffic in bytes */,
  "traffic_out_b" TEXT /* Outgoing traffic in bytes */,
  "traffic_in_95th_b" TEXT /* 95th percentile incoming traffic in bytes */,
  "traffic_out_95th_b" TEXT /* 95th percentile outgoing traffic in bytes */,
  "traffic_in_99th_b" TEXT /* 99th percentile incoming traffic in bytes */,
  "traffic_out_99th_b" TEXT /* 99th percentile outgoing traffic in bytes */,
  "total_network_interfaces" INTEGER /* Total number of network interfaces on the VM */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_metrics_vm_id FOREIGN KEY ("vm_id") REFERENCES virtual_machines ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disk_metrics" (
  "disk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disk metric record */,
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the virtual machine */,
  "disc_write_b" TEXT /* Disk write operations in bytes */,
  "disc_read_b" TEXT /* Disk read operations in bytes */,
  "disc_write_95th_b" TEXT /* 95th percentile disk write operations in bytes */,
  "disc_read_95th_b" TEXT /* 95th percentile disk read operations in bytes */,
  "disc_write_99th_b" TEXT /* 99th percentile disk write operations in bytes */,
  "disc_read_99th_b" TEXT /* 99th percentile disk read operations in bytes */,
  "total_disk_space_gb" REAL /* Total disk space in GB of the VM */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disk_metrics_vm_id FOREIGN KEY ("vm_id") REFERENCES virtual_machines ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for notifications */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the virtual machine */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., CPU high, Memory low) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vm_id FOREIGN KEY ("vm_id") REFERENCES virtual_machines ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record in the history */,
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the virtual machine */,
  "cpu_avg" REAL /* Average CPU usage percentage over time */,
  "memory_avg" REAL /* Average Memory usage in GB over time */,
  "network_traffic_avg" REAL /* Average network traffic in bytes over time */,
  "disk_io_avg" REAL /* Average disk I/O operations in bytes over time */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Retention period for the historical data in days */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_vm_id FOREIGN KEY ("vm_id") REFERENCES virtual_machines ("vm_id")
)
